subcodes.title: The Meaning of Speaking in Tongues
subcodes.first_line: The meaning is that the Apostles taught in a spiritual tongue, a tongue that embraces all tongues.
subcodes.first_line_orig: جواب  مقصد حضرات حواریون بلسان ملکوتی تبلیغ مینمودند و آن لسان مطابق جمیع لسانها است
subcodes.subjects: @Christ; Christianity, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @The Holy Spirit
